description: Expose USD cost tracking to dashboard, hex status, and HexFlo memory

specs.given: hex-agent has recorded costs via TokenMetricsAdapter
specs.then: Shows total cost USD and per-task breakdown

specs.description: Cost shows in hex status command
specs.then: Shows current session cost in output

specs.description: Cost stored in HexFlo memory for swarm visibility
specs.then: Cost is stored in hexflo_memory table
